prompt: Create a bar chart comparing GPT-4, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, and Gemini Pro on MMLU accuracy (89.2%, 88.7%, 83.7%). Save it as a PNG.

assertions.description: Script calls use_anthropic_defaults() or loads anthropic.mplstyle
A .png file exists in the outputs directory
Does not use default matplotlib blue (#1f77b4)
